title: [Arc][ArcCanonicalizer] Segfault
body:
ArcCanonicalizer crashes on attached input. I was able to reduce the testcase to 600 lines of IR (reduction of 93% compared to original), but reducing it further seems to make it trigger only sometimes.

I would guess that the SymbolCache is not properly updated by one of the patterns, but don't actually know.

Stack trace on a RelWithDebugInfo build:
```
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/circt and include the crash backtrace.
Stack dump:
```
